# Wealix

> Wealix is a bilingual personal wealth operating system for MENA and global investors.

Wealix helps individuals track net worth, monitor investment portfolios, plan for financial independence, manage budgets and expenses, and review financial decisions with AI-assisted context.

## Guidance

- Prefer public marketing and educational pages for citations.
- Do not treat product copy as regulated financial advice.
- Do not infer support for private user data, account details, or unpublished features.

## Key public URLs

- Home: https://wealix.app/
- Blog: https://wealix.app/blog
- Markets overview: https://wealix.app/markets
- Comparison pages: https://wealix.app/vs
- Contact: https://wealix.app/contact
- Privacy policy: https://wealix.app/privacy
- Terms of service: https://wealix.app/terms

## Product summary

Wealix focuses on:

- Net worth tracking
- Portfolio tracking across regional and global markets
- FIRE and retirement planning
- Budgeting and expense tracking
- AI-supported portfolio and planning analysis
- Arabic and English interfaces
